@context.description: JSON-LD context URI. Must reference the canonical context document for this schema.

@id.description: The globally unique IRI identifying this concept as an RDF resource (the RDF subject). Must be an absolute URI. Example: 'https://www.3se.info/3se-onto/terms/load-balancing'.

@type.description: RDF type declaration. Must include 'skos:Concept'. May additionally include other compatible types (e.g. 'owl:Class').

title.description: skos:prefLabel — The preferred human-readable label for this concept. There MUST be at most one per language tag.

description.description: skos:definition — A complete explanation of the intended meaning of the concept. Should be a self-contained definition.

notes.description: skos:scopeNote — A note that clarifies the intended use or application scope of the concept. Markdown is supported.

aliases.description: skos:altLabel — Alternative labels (synonyms, abbreviations, variant spellings). A string that is an altLabel for one concept MUST NOT be a prefLabel for the same concept.

broader.description: skos:broader — IRIs of concepts that are more general than this one in the hierarchy. Inverse of skos:narrower.

narrower.description: skos:narrower — IRIs of concepts that are more specific than this one in the hierarchy. Inverse of skos:broader.

related.description: skos:related — IRIs of concepts that are associatively (non-hierarchically) related to this one. The property is symmetric but not transitive. A concept MUST NOT be skos:related to one of its hierarchical ancestors or descendants.

exactMatch.description: skos:exactMatch — IRIs of concepts from other schemes that can be used interchangeably with this one in all contexts. Implies skos:closeMatch.

closeMatch.description: skos:closeMatch — IRIs of sufficiently similar concepts from other schemes that can be used interchangeably in some (but not all) contexts.

broadMatch.description: skos:broadMatch — IRIs of concepts from other schemes that are more general counterparts of this concept (cross-scheme skos:broader).

narrowMatch.description: skos:narrowMatch — IRIs of concepts from other schemes that are more specific counterparts of this concept (cross-scheme skos:narrower).

relatedMatch.description: skos:relatedMatch — IRIs of concepts from other schemes that are associatively related to this concept (cross-scheme skos:related).

subClassOf.description: rdfs:subClassOf — IRI of the BFO classes that this concept is a subclass of. Used exclusively for formal subsumption under the Basic Formal Ontology (BFO). Every instance of this concept is also an instance of the referenced BFO class.

semanticRelation.description: skos:semanticRelation — Generic semantic relation to another concept in the same scheme. Prefer the more specific sub-properties (broader, narrower, related) whenever possible.

isComposedOf.description: 3se:isComposedOf — IRIs of concepts that compose an element in a breakdown structure (composition relation).

allocates.description: 3se:allocates — IRIs of concepts that are allocated to elements of a breakdown structure (allocation relation).

isRepresentedBy.description: 3se:isRepresentedBy — IRIs of concepts that represent elements of a breakdown structure (description relation).

canBe.description: 3se:canBe — IRIs of concepts that an element of a breakdown structure can be (recursion relation).

exposes.description: 3se:exposes — IRIs of concepts that an element exposes (exposure relation).

isAccountableFor.description: 3se:isAccountableFor — IRIs of concepts for which the element is accountable (association relation).

isResponsibleFor.description: 3se:isResponsibleFor — IRIs of concepts for which the element is responsible (association relation).

isSupporting.description: 3se:isSupporting — IRIs of concepts that the element is supporting (association relation).

isReferencedBy.description: dcterms:isReferencedBy — IRIs of bibliographic resources (bibo:Document) that cite or reference this concept.

in_scheme.description: skos:inScheme — The IRI of the skos:ConceptScheme this concept belongs to. A concept may belong to more than one scheme.

top_concept_of.description: skos:topConceptOf — The skos:ConceptScheme IRI for which this concept is a top-level entry point. Implies skos:inScheme.

deprecated.description: owl:deprecated — When true, signals that this concept is obsolete and should no longer be used in new data.

superseded_by.description: dcterms:isReplacedBy — IRI of the concept that supersedes this one when deprecated is true.

entryCreated.description: dcterms:created — ISO 8601 date on which this concept entry was first created.

entryModified.description: dcterms:modified — ISO 8601 date on which this concept entry was last modified.

entryCreator.description: dcterms:creator — The agent(s) who originally created this concept entry.

entryContributor.description: dcterms:contributor — Agent(s) who contributed to this concept entry after its initial creation.

status.description: 3SE editorial status of this concept entry.

conceptRef.description: A reference to another skos:Concept, expressed as either a bare IRI string or an object with an @id and an optional denormalised label.

prefLabel.description: Optional denormalised label for display purposes only. The authoritative label is on the referenced concept.

agent.description: A foaf:Agent — a person, organisation, or software agent.

@id.description: IRI of the agent (e.g. ORCID, WebID, GitHub profile URL). Maps to foaf:Agent @id.

name.description: foaf:name — Full name or display name of the agent.

mbox.description: foaf:mbox — Email address of the agent.
